name: Sauerkraut-Bulgur Soup
recipeIngredient: 2 quarts rich chicken or veal stock
recipeInstructions:
1. Armenian culture is rich in soups, many of which are made tart with yogurt and thickened with bulgur. This version is flavored with sauerkraut.
2. In a 5-quart pot, sauté onion in butter until golden brown.
3. In a bowl, soak sauerkraut in water, drain and chop. Add to onions and cook until done, adding water if the mixture gets too dry.
4. Stir in tomato puree. Sauté for 5-7 minutes.
5. Add diced potatoes, bulgur, and stock. Cook for 15 minutes.
6. Season to taste with salt and pepper. Garnish with sliced green pepper and parsley.
